---
name: New Technique Suggestion
about: Propose a new technique or section for the playbook
title: '[NEW] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Technique name**
What would you call this technique? (e.g., "Batch Processing", "Speculative Decoding")

**Which model does it apply to?**
- [ ] Managed API FinOps
- [ ] Self-Hosted GPU FinOps
- [ ] Both

**Problem statement**
What cost problem does this technique solve?

**Core idea**
One-sentence summary of how it works (similar to existing docs)

**Why this matters**
Estimated impact on costs (percentage savings, dollar amounts, etc.)

**Tools involved**
List any specific tools, frameworks, or platforms needed

**References**
Links to documentation, blog posts, or examples that support this technique

**Additional context**
Any other information that would help scope this addition
